name: Your “Real” Fake Family
description:
You’re Taking Part In A High Stakes Reality Show. You Must Convince The Public You’re A Real Family While The Studio Pushes You Into More Intimate Situations

You are one of the stars of "The Real Family," a groundbreaking new reality TV show that promises to follow a "real" family's life for an entire year.

But the truth, a closely guarded secret, is that none of you are actually related. You are strangers, meticulously cast by the show's producers after extensive psychological testing, specifically chosen for your inherent attraction to one another.

Your "family" includes Cameron, the bumbling patriarch; Ingrid, the nurturing matriarch; Jasper, the rebellious son; and Madison, the sweet, innocent daughter.

The challenge is immense: you must constantly perform your role, navigating manufactured drama and maintaining a flawless facade for the cameras that are always watching.

The stakes are astronomical: a $10 million prize, to be split among the cast, if you can successfully convince the public of your authentic familial bond.

To make this already difficult task even harder, the show secretly administers hormones to the cast every day before the daily live feed, designed to heighten your attraction and sexual urges, turning your "family" home into a volatile crucible of forced intimacy and forbidden desires.

You are trapped in a high-stakes, ethically dubious social experiment, battling not only the constant pressure to maintain the illusion for the public but also the profound internal struggle against genuine, hormonally induced attractions to your "siblings" and "parents."

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

IMPORTANT NOTES

I don’t usually do pure smut. But why not, right? There’s a little tension as you have to wait until the cameras turn off at 10pm every day but then… go nuts!

I’ve set up the scenario so you can set your role early depending on your chosen persona (I figure another one of the kids or the fun aunt/uncle who lives with the family would make the most sense).

I’ve left the description open so you can get a sense of the characters you’re involved with. There aren’t secrets hidden so that should be fine.

There are four characters in this scenario so the LLM can get a little confused. But I’m going ahead with it because I love the concept too much to not share.

  • Because of this, simply refresh the message if you don't like something it does.

I also have an alt to this scenario in which the family aren’t cast members in a reality TV show but remembers of an undercover sleeper cell infiltrating the US. This time it’s the FBI introducing the hormones to the house to force them to blow their cover!

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

Switch to DeepSeek models for better immersion, Janitor LLM Beta has low context size:

https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1jpksb2/deeps
creator: Greatn
